description: Baseline OCR fixture with high-contrast text and exact business-rule content for single-label review tests.

covers.frontend_upload: Use this PNG in a browser-level upload test to verify the file picker accepts image fixtures and submits multipart form data.
covers.backend_ingest_and_preprocess: Use this PNG in API or service tests to verify the backend reads non-empty image bytes and routes the file through the OCR provider path.
covers.ocr_extraction: Use OCR anchor text assertions to confirm the provider can recover the label text needed for extraction.
covers.processing_and_validation: Use the extracted fields and review status expectations below to validate normalization and strict government warning handling.

ocr_anchor_text: Bottled by Old Tom Distillery, Frankfort, KY.

expected_extracted_fields.producer: Bottled by Old Tom Distillery, Frankfort, KY
expected_extracted_fields.government_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
